description: GeoClaw reduced-mode eddy-line/shear profile closure for the corrected-boundary Milestone 18 rapid-feature row.

source.notes: Derived from normalized GeoClaw h/u/v fields for eddy_line_shear_seed_20; used only as bounded reduced-mode fixture calibration with feature forcing disabled, reduced-profile fast path enabled, and initial-mass preservation disabled for the open-boundary comparison.
